本頁整合 Colistimethate Sodium 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Colobreathe is indicated for the management of chronic pulmonary infections due to Pseudomonas aeruginosa in patients with cystic fibrosis (CF) aged six years and older. Consideration should be given...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>osteoarthritis（97.8%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（97.5%）</li>
<li>osteoarthritis susceptibility（97.4%）</li>
<li>gout（96.8%）</li>
<li>pseudoachondroplasia（96.7%）</li>
<li>hepatic porphyria（96.7%）</li>
<li>brachyolmia（96.4%）</li>
<li>early-onset familial noncirrhotic portal hypertension（96.3%）</li>
<li>idiopathic copper-associated cirrhosis（96.3%）</li>
<li>primitive portal vein thrombosis（96.3%）</li>
<li>hepatopulmonary syndrome（96.3%）</li>
<li>hepatoportal sclerosis（96.3%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（96.3%）</li>
<li>acromesomelic dysplasia, Hunter-Thompson type（96.2%）</li>
<li>brachyolmia-amelogenesis imperfecta syndrome（96.0%）</li>
<li>myosclerosis（96.0%）</li>
<li>arthropathy（95.7%）</li>
<li>congestive heart failure（95.3%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（95.2%）</li>
<li>acute pulmonary heart disease（94.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
